description: Migrate the Discord plugin to use SDK utilities: replace duplicated localStorage iframe fallback with SDK getLocalStorage, replace manual token persistence with getAuthCache/setAuthCache/clearAuthCache, and replace manual waitForAuth polling with waitUntil.
qualityChecks: cd plugins/discord && npm run build && npm run type-check && npm run lint && npm run format:check

userStories.title: Migrate Discord plugin to SDK utilities
userStories.description: Replace Discord's duplicated localStorage iframe fallback, manual token persistence, and manual waitForAuth with SDK equivalents.
acceptanceCriteria: readLocalStorage function removed — replaced by getLocalStorage from SDK (which already has the identical iframe fallback)
getPersistedToken/setPersistedToken/clearPersistedToken replaced with getAuthCache/setAuthCache/clearAuthCache from SDK using namespace 'discord'
waitForDiscordAuth uses waitUntil wrapped to return boolean
No setInterval or clearInterval calls remain in auth code
